institution.name: Vaughn College of Aeronautics and Technology

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Vaughn College of Aeronautics and Technology fell 29% between 2021 and 2024 (28.6% → 20.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Vaughn College of Aeronautics and Technology vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.1k vs 1.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Vaughn College of Aeronautics and Technology rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.1k → $29.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Vaughn College of Aeronautics and Technology rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.1k → $29.8k).
